STELLINA   26,051 DWT OPEN UMM QASR  28-29 DEC
++++++++
MV YASA VENUS
BUILT 2019 – MARSHALL ISLANDS FLAG
61,076 DWT ON 13.025M SW
INT GRT/NRT 34508/20175
LOA/BEAM 199.90/32.24 M
TPC: ABT 60.4
CO2 FITTED IN HOLDS / CERTAIN APP. B CARGOES LOADABLE IN NO 5 HOLD/
2X25 T. STEEL COILS IN HOLDS, STRENGTENED HOLDS 2 & 4 MAY BE EMPTY
CRANES 4 X 30 MT ELECTRO-HYDRAULIC CRANES JIANGSU MASADA HEAVY INDUSTRIES
LICENCE IF MITSUBISHI.
GRABS: 4 X 13 CBM (15 MTONS PAYLOAD)(ADJUSTABLE CAPACITY) SHANGHAI GRAB,
RADIO CONTROLLED TYPE GRABS (THE GRABS ARE UNSUITABLE TO HANDLING BULK
LUMP ORE (OVER 50MM) AND FINE CARGO (LESS THAN 1MM) SUCH AS SODA ASH/ALUMINA ETC
GRAINS/BALE 77,528 CBM /74,146 CBM
5 HO/HA
SPEED/CONSUMPTION
BALLAST ABT 12.50 KTS ON ABT 15.80 MTS VLSIFO + ABT 0.10 MT LSMGO
LADEN   ABT 12.50 KTS ON ABT 20.30 MTS VLSIFO + ABT 0.10 MT LSMGO
GENERATOR PORT CONSUMPTION (T/DAY)
IN PORT WORKING/IDLE: ABT 4.5/2.5 MT VLSIFO + ABT 0.10 MT LSMGO
BOILER (ONLY AT PORT – T/DAY VLSIFO) 1.5 MTS TON/DAY
FOR EVERY BALLAST/DEBALLAST/EXCHANGE OF BALLAST OPERATION (EXCL BWTS)
ADDITIONAL ABT 1 MT/DAY VLSIFO
ECO SPEED GIVEN
BALLAST  ABT 12 KTS ON ABT 15.00 MTS VLSIFO + ABT 0.1 MT LSMGO
LADEN    ABT 12 KTS ON ABT 18.0 MTS VLSIFO + ABT 0.1 MT LSMGO
BUNKER SPECS:
VLSFO GRADE 380 CST RMG 380 ISO 8217:2017 – MAX 0.5% SULPHUR CONTENT
LSMGO GRADE DMA ISO 8217:2017 – MAX 0.1% SULPHUR CONTENT
THE FUELS SHALL BE OF STABLE AND HOMOGENEOUS NATURE AND SUITABLE FOR
BURNING IN THE VESSEL’S ENGINES OR AUXILIARIES AND, UNLESS AGREED IN
WRITING, SHALL COMPLY WITH ISO STANDARD 8217:2017 OR ANY SUBSEQUENT
AMENDSMENTS THEREOF. CHARTERERS OPTION TO SUPPLY 2010 SPECS IF ISO 2017
SPEC IS NOT AVAILABLE.
IN THE EVENT OF REPLENISHMENT IN SOUTH AFRICAN PORTS WHERE 380 RMG IS NOT AVAILABLE
CHARTERERS ALLOWED TO SUPPLY: RMG 180 CST ISO 8217:2017
ALL GRADES SUPPLIED NOT TO CONTAIN AUTOMOTIVE LUBRICATION OR OTHER WASTE CHEMICALS AND ALWAYS TO BE IN ACCORDANCE WITH MARPOL 73/78 ANNEX VI RULES AND REGULATIONS.
COMINGLING OF VSLFO IS NOT ALLOWED
OWNERS WARRANT THE VESSEL IS CAPABLE OF MAINTAINING AND SHALL MAINTAIN SPEED/CONSUMPTION THROUGHOUT PERIOD OF CHARTER PARTY, BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITION, WINDS UP TO BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEA SCALE 3 SIGNIFICANT WAWE HEIGHT OF 1,25M (TOTAL COMBINED SEA AND SWELL) WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENTS OR NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL,  EFFECTIVE FOR VOYAGES EXCEEDING 48 HOURS FROM BEGINNING SEA PASSAGE TO END SEA PASSAGE, EXCLUDING PASSAGE WITH RESTRICTED VISIBILITY AND CONGESTED WATERS, STRAITS, NARROWED WATERS AND WHILE FOLLOWING SLOW STEAM INSTRUCTIONS, MANOEURVING, ENTERING OR LEAVING PORTS ABD 12HRS AFTER COSP/PRIOR EOSP AND EXCLUDING PERIODS DURING WHICH REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY, ETC. CLAIMS FOR UNDERPERFORMANCE SHOULD ONLY BE LIMITED TO GOOD WEATHER PERIODS; ADMISSIBLE PERIOD OF GOOD WEATHER HAS TO BE A PERIOD OF 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS RUNNING FROM NOON TO NOON ONLY AND NO EXTRAPOLATION TO BE MADE. THE EFECT OF POSITIVE CURRENTS NOT TO BE DEBITED FROM THE VSL SPEED IN PERFORMANCE CALCULATIONS. ABOUT ON SPEED AND CONSUMPTION CLARIFIED AS MEANING 5% ALLOWANCE ON CONSUMPTION AND 0,5 KNOTS ON SPEED. THE VESSEL IS ALLOWED TO USE MARINE DIESEL OIL (ISO-F-DMB) OR GASOIL WHEN MANEUVERING AND PASSING NARROW / RESTRICTED / CONFINED WATER, INCLUDING WHEN THE VESSEL CARRIES OUT HOLD CLEANING AND BILGE PUMPING.
ALL DETAILS ABT/WOG
+++++++++
STELLINA
26,051 DWAT ON 8,78 M SSW
GENERAL CARGO BOX/OPEN HATCH
LIBERIA/2014
4 HO/HA -TOTAL: ABOUT 34,354.51 M3
3 X 35 TONS CRANES (NO COMBINATION)
CEMENT HOLES FITTED
ALL DETAILS ABT/WOG
PLSD TO HEAR
